Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: chests (case furniture) [300038992], case furniture [300038860], storage and display furniture [300164528], furniture by form or function [300048628], furniture [300037680], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: commemoratives [300235430], object genres by function [300117143], object genres (object classifications) [300185712], Object Genres (hierarchy name) [300185711], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Chests made to commemorate or anticipate a wedding; usually incorporating names and dates in their decoration.
Arcones fabricados para celebrar o esperar un matrimonio; normalmente incorporando nombres y fechas en su decoración.
Kisten die voor een bruiloft zijn gemaakt of ter nagedachtenis hiervan. Meestal werden er namen en data in de decoraties verwerkt.
用以紀念或籌備婚禮所用的箱櫃；通常刻有名字和日期作為裝飾。
Truhe, die hergestellt wurde, um einer Hochzeit zu gedenken oder daran teilzunehmen; gewöhnlich sind inn ihrer Dekoration die Namen und Daten (der Heiratenden) enthalten.

Source.Source_ID: 2000052012/Davidson and Stillinger, American Wing at the MMAt (1985)
